summary: RETEST iteration 149 — PackageBooking MoMo dialog flow VERIFIED WORKING. Confirmed: (1) data-testids on payment tiles are now in DOM (payment-method-stripe, payment-method-mtn_momo, payment-method-orange_money, all visible:true). (2) After filling sender_address manually + receiver + description + 3 photos uploaded (3x 200 OK), MoMo tile becomes enabled, click → Confirm → MoMo Radix dialog opens with phone prefilled '+237 677251682' and amount '5,460 FCFA' visible. Screenshot confirms dialog rendered without overlay coverage. Cancel via momo-change-method-btn closes dialog, booking page interactive again. HOWEVER, an unrelated UX bug surfaced: the sender-self toggle in PackageBooking.jsx (lines 120-125) autofills sender_name/phone/email from profile but does NOT autofill sender_address — so first-time users toggling 'I'm the sender' still see the amber 'Complete sender details' banner and cannot reach payment unless they manually type Pickup Address. This blocks the happy-path the test instructions described.

ui_bugs.issue: Toggling 'I'm the sender' autofills name/phone/email from profile but leaves Pickup Address (sender_address) empty. isFormValid stays false → payment tiles + Confirm stay disabled. Users get stuck at the amber 'Complete sender details' banner with no obvious clue. Suggest: also pull profile.address (or last booking address) into sender_address, or at minimum make the address field visually focused / required-marker pulse so the user knows what to fill.

issues: Console floods with 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle' + 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' a11y warnings — wrap titles in VisuallyHidden where decorative-only, or add real DialogTitle/DialogDescription.

action_items: BUG (medium): In PackageBooking.jsx setBooking after profile fetch (around line 120-126), also set sender_address from profile.address / profile.location / profile.full_address (whichever the customer profile exposes). Without this, the entire MoMo + Stripe payment flow is unreachable via the sender-self happy path — exactly what iteration 148 hit and what nearly blocked this retest. Same fix should apply to the user-fallback branch at line 130-135.
(Optional) Fix Radix Dialog a11y warnings — add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle/DialogDescription to the booking 'Service details' modal that fires before MoMo opens.
MoMo + Stripe wiring itself is CORRECT — no further action on PaymentMethodsSelection.jsx or PackageBooking payment props.
critical_code_review_comments: PaymentMethodsSelection.jsx data-testid wiring (line 446) and prop contract are correct — MoMo dialog opens reliably with prefilled phone and amount.

PackageBooking.jsx isFormValid (line 184-189) is strict (requires sender_address) but the sender-self toggle never sets it — root cause of the apparent 'stuck' state observed in iteration 148 and partially in this iteration. ONE LINE FIX in the profile autofill effect resolves it.
MiniImageUploader.jsx upload flow works (3x POST /api/uploads/ → 200) — no issue.

success_rate.frontend: MoMo dialog flow 100% verified once sender_address filled; Stripe path partial (couldn't fully run after MoMo cancel due to test-time budget — but tile is in DOM and clickable; confirm button enables identically)

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral booking attempt (no order created — cancelled before MoMo request).
context_for_next_testing_agent: data-testids on payment tiles are confirmed working: payment-method-stripe, payment-method-mtn_momo, payment-method-orange_money (orange disabled). MoMo dialog (data-testid=momo-payment-modal) opens with id=momo-phone prefilled with sender_phone (+237 677251682) and data-testid=momo-amount showing total. To run the full happy path you MUST manually fill data-testid=sender-address-input with any string AFTER toggling sender-self — the toggle does NOT autofill the address field. Once that's done: click MoMo tile → confirm → dialog opens (~10s for 2 backend round trips POST /api/packages/ + POST /api/orders/create). Cancel via data-testid=momo-change-method-btn. For Stripe, click data-testid=payment-method-stripe + confirm-booking-btn → opens StripeCheckoutModal (in-page foreground modal, NOT a redirect anymore — note: the spec said 'window.location changes to checkout.stripe.com' but the implementation now uses an in-foreground modal via StripeCheckoutModal; verify that's intentional).
rca of the issue: Bug RCA: the visible 'Confirm Booking button stays disabled' / 'amber banner persists' problem is NOT a regression of the MoMo prop fix — the prop fix from iteration 148 works correctly. The actual blocker is in PackageBooking.jsx profile-autofill effect (line 120-126): when `isSenderSelf=true`, the effect copies profile.full_name, phone, email into booking state but never sets sender_address. Since isFormValid (line 184) requires booking.sender_address to be truthy, the form is stuck at false → PaymentMethodsSelection wrapper gets pointer-events-none + opacity-50 → all tiles disabled → Confirm disabled. Reproduction: toggle 'I'm the sender' → fill receiver/description/photos → observe Confirm stays disabled and Pickup Address field is empty. Mitigation: pull profile.address (or any last-known address) when copying profile fields, OR keep sender_address out of isFormValid when isSenderSelf is true and let it fall back to a default like 'Pickup TBD — operator will call'.
